sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25299" key="diamolu/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαμολύνω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῡ]</foreign>, <sense id="n25299.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">befoul with writing,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">παλίμψηστα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.504d</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
